title: God Will Take Care of You

c_lines: Music: 'Martin' Walter Stillman Martin, 1905. Setting: "Alexander's Gospel Songs", 1908.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2012 Revision.

1.raw_text: Be not dismayed whate'er betide, God will take care of you; Beneath His wings of love abide, God will take care of you. God will take care of you, through ev'ry day, o'er all the way; He will take care of you, God will take care of you.

2.raw_text: Through days of toil when heart doth fail, God will take care of you; When dangers fierce your path assail, God will take care of you. God will take care of you, through ev'ry day, o'er all the way; He will take care of you, God will take care of you.

3.raw_text: All you may need He will provide, God will take care of you; Nothing you ask will be denied, God will take care of you. God will take care of you, through ev'ry day, o'er all the way; He will take care of you, God will take care of you.

4.raw_text: No matter what may be the test, God will take care of you; Lean, weary one, upon His breast, God will take care of you. God will take care of you, through ev'ry day, o'er all the way; He will take care of you, God will take care of you.
